subject: [PATCH v2 3/3] fuse: fix moving cancelled entry to ent_in_userspace list

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) implementation where cancelled entries were being moved to the ent_in_userspace list, causing a crash when the first entry on this list was dereferenced. The fix involves freeing the cancelled entry and dropping queue references directly in fuse_uring_cancel(), which is safe because cancel is the cancel handler itself. Additionally, the patch removes a gate that prevented aborting requests when queue references were greater than 0, as cancelled entries may have already dropped these references while requests are still queued.
